creator: lynx.ripe@gmail.com
text:
Hello!

  Unfortunately, the last port revision (2010-11-30 20:15:20) doesn't
fix the problem for me. I've removed and re-fetched via csup
the complete ports tree (on 2010-12-08 approx. near 00:00 UTC), and
then rebuilt the port in the jail w/o any installed ports - the
problem persists (bin2cpp: not found). Here is the complete build log:

http://sites.google.com/site/lynxripe/freebsd/pr/152495/djvulibre_20101208_0940.txt?attredirects=0&d=1

-- 
Sincerely, Dmitry
nic-hdl: LYNX-RIPE
